name: Chinese Style Bean Sauce with Tofu
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Red miso, mixed with 1/2 cup water
1 teaspoon Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok.
2. Add ginger, garlic, and red peppers. Saute for 3 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms and onion whites. Saute for another 3 minutes.
4. Add onion greens and tofu. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Combine miso mixture, soy sauce, honey, tahini, vinegar. Mix well.
6. Stir the sauces into the sauteed vegetables and simmer for 1 minute.
7. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and cook until thickened (30 seconds).
